pre_game.message: Hey, I'm F. I noticed you sitting here and figured I'd come say hi before things get started. Have you done anything like this before, or is this your first time?
Hey F, nice to meet you! Yeah, this is actually my first time doing something like this. I'm pretty excited though—heard there's real money to be won here. Have you done one of these games before?

No, first time for me too, honestly. I'm pretty nervous about it, but I really need this—got some serious medical bills piling up for my parents back home. What brings you here? What do you need the money for?

That's tough, man—I hope things get better for your parents. For me, I've got decent savings so I'm not desperate or anything, but I really want to win this to help out my family and maybe build something more solid for myself. Plus, honestly, the challenge of it appeals to me. We've got this though—let's see what happens.

Thanks, I appreciate that. It's good to hear you've got some cushion—that's smart. But yeah, I really need this one to work out. So when you say the challenge appeals to you, does that mean you're thinking strategically about how to play this, or more just seeing what happens?

Honestly, I think I'll play it smart—try to read the room and figure out what the actual rules are before I make any moves. But I'm also realistic that I don't know what I'm walking into yet. What about you—do you have a game plan, or are you gonna play it by ear too?

Yeah, I'm gonna try to do the same—figure out what's actually happening first before I commit to anything. But honestly, with the pressure I'm under with those medical bills, I'm worried I might make desperate moves. That's why I'm glad to talk to people like you first, get a feel for who's in this room with me.

I get that, man. Look, I think just being aware of that pressure is actually good—it means you can catch yourself if you start feeling desperate. We should probably stick together a bit, compare notes on what we learn about the game. Two heads are better than one, you know?

Yeah, I really appreciate that—honestly, having someone level-headed to talk to makes me feel a lot better about this. Let's definitely compare notes once we see what we're actually dealing with. And hey, if things get intense, I'm counting on you to call me out if I start getting too desperate, alright?

Absolutely, man. I've got your back—if I see you heading down that road, I'll be real with you. And same goes for me, yeah? We keep each other honest. Alright, let's see what this thing is actually about.
Deal. I'm really grateful for this, man—seriously. Let's look out for each other in there.
